Photographe · Réalisatrice

Mathilde
Godard

Based in Nantes, France — available worldwide.

Mathilde Godard is a freelance photographer and video post-producer specialising in portrait, fashion, travel, architecture and landscape photography.

Her work explores the relationship between light, space and the human form. With a background in visual arts, she brings a painterly sensibility to both her photography and video direction.

Available for commercial, editorial and personal projects.
